idea-plugin.name: Copy with inline issues for AI
idea-plugin.description:
Tired of manually typing out error messages when asking ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini for help? This plugin copies your code with all errors, warnings, and syntax issues as inline comments — ready to paste directly into any AI assistant.

Before vs after

You copy this:

def calculate(a, b):
    result = a + c
    return result

You paste this:

# FILE: calculator.py
def calculate(a, b):
    result = a + c
    # ERROR: undefined variable 'c'
    return result

How it works

  1. Select code or right-click a file in the project tree
  2. Choose "Copy with inline issues" from the context menu
  3. Paste into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, or any AI tool — errors included

Key features

  • AI-Ready Output — Paste directly into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor, or any LLM for instant debugging help
  • Copy Selection or Entire File — Works from the editor (selection) and project tree (full file)
  • Multi-Language — Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, C/C++, C#, Go, Ruby, Rust, SQL, HTML, CSS, YAML, and more
  • Comprehensive Detection — Captures syntax errors, semantic issues, and inspection warnings
  • Language-Aware Comments — Automatically uses the correct comment syntax for each language

Supported languages

Java, Kotlin, JS, TS, C/C++, C#, Go, Rust// ERROR: message
Python, Ruby, Shell, YAML# ERROR: message
SQL, Lua, Haskell-- ERROR: message
HTML, XML<!-- ERROR: message -->
CSS/* ERROR: message */

Works with

IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, PhpStorm, GoLand, CLion, Rider, DataGrip, and all JetBrains IDEs.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.1.0

  • Renamed to "Copy with inline issues for AI" - Better discoverability in the marketplace for users looking for AI-powered coding tools
  • Improved plugin description - Clear before/after code example, step-by-step usage guide, and supported languages table
  • Updated README - Redesigned GitHub page with better onboarding

action.description: Copy selected code with associated errors and warnings as comments
Copy entire file content with associated errors and warnings as comments
